# Compute aggregated signatures from individual signatures
# Last modified: 06/26/25
# Author: Kewalin Samart

##### Load libraries and sort scripts
```{r}
library(readr)
library(here)
source(here("scripts/00_background_genes_PA_functions.R"))
source(here("scripts/01_signature_aggregation_functions.R"))
```

##### Initialize arguments
```{r}
# example argument
metadata_path = here("data/v2/signatures/RNAseq_TB_signature_run_info.tsv")
data_path = here("data/v2/signatures/RNAseq")
direction = "dn"
bg_source = "LINCS" # L1000 genes
extra_arg= "landmark"
output_dir = here("data/v2/signatures/RNAseq/aggregated_signatures")
threshold_pct <- 0.90
```

##### Compute membership matrix
```{r}
gene_membership_matrix = compute_membership_matrix(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, 
                          direction = direction, bg_source = bg_source, 
                          output_dir = output_dir, extra_arg = extra_arg, save_result=TRUE)
```

##### Compute jaccard matrix
```{r}
jaccard_matrix = compute_jaccard_matrix(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, 
                       direction = direction, output_dir = output_dir, 
                       extra_arg = extra_arg, save_result=TRUE) 
```

##### Compute aggregated signature
```{r}
aggregate_signatures(gene_membership_matrix, jaccard_matrix, output_dir, direction, threshold_pct, save_result=TRUE)
```
